source_commit_note: Dispatch should use the merge commit containing the mixed-precision attention quality estimator and control-plane hook.

requested_items.objective: Screen mixed-precision attention arithmetic candidates against a Llama7B-shape quality proxy before PPA.

expected_result.reason: Use the proxy-passing mixed-precision candidates to decide the next attention compute PPA target and the required follow-up model-quality gate.
